title: euphorbia hirta
intro: Euphorbia hirta, also known as asthma plant or fetid euphorbia, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and calm coughs, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Euphorbia hirta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
